name: Manhattan-Style Clam Chowder
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Bacon, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until crispy and drain on paper towels. Crumble into small pieces.
2. In a large pot, sauté onion in butter over medium heat for about 5 minutes until softened.
3. Add parsley, celery, green onions, black pepper, and clam juice. Simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Stir in minced garlic and tomatoes. Bring to a boil, then simmer for another 25 minutes.
5. Add the clams, reserved clam juice from the can of clams, and water. Season with salt to taste.
6. Cook until clams open, about 10-12 minutes.
7. Sprinkle parsley on top before serving with bread or oyster crackers.
